name: Stix Golf Lounge
address: 13272 MO-13 Ste D, Kimberling City, MO 65686
about: Stix Golf Lounge combines a sports bar environment with golf simulation technology, featuring NFL Sunday Ticket on big screens and 2 simulators. Located on State Highway 13 in Kimberling City, Missouri, the venue offers a casual setting for both golf and social activities. It provides a unique experience for patrons looking to enjoy a drink while playing virtual golf on a high-resolution screen with 1366x768 display capabilities. The facility appears to focus on creating an accessible atmosphere with a reservation system for bay bookings.
why_golfers_like_it: Integrated sports bar environment allows golf and socializing
Big screens with NFL Sunday Ticket create an engaging viewing experience
Reservation system ensures guaranteed bay access
Convenient location on State Highway 13 for easy access
Combination of golf technology and bar amenities in one location

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available as indicated by the MENU section
Full bar available as sports bar with cocktails mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Hardware specifications not explicitly detailed on website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but as a simulation venue, they likely provide club rentals. Contact them directly for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, Stix Golf Lounge has its own full kitchen and bar. They offer food and beverages for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 2 simulators available, playing time would depend on group size and reservation duration. Contact the venue for specific time estimates.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility appears to be family-friendly, with a casual sports bar atmosphere and accommodations for groups.
